summary.text: Provides a builder for configuring and integrating an Aspire Chat Completions client into a host application.

remarks.text: This class is used to configure the necessary parameters for creating an Aspire Chat Completions client, such as the host application builder, service key, and optional model ID. It is intended for internal use within the application setup process.

deploymentName.text: The name of the deployment in Azure AI Foundry.

disableTracing.text: A flag to indicate whether tracing should be disabled.

enableSensitiveTelemetryData.text: A flag indicating whether potentially sensitive information should be included in telemetry.

hostBuilder.text: with which services are being registered.

serviceKey.text: The service key used to register the

Represents configuration settings for Azure AI Chat Completions client.
Gets or sets the connection string used to connect to the AI Foundry account.
Gets or sets the name of the AI model deployment to use for chat completions.
Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry metrics are enabled or not.
Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry tracing is disabled or not.
Gets or sets a boolean value indicating whether potentially sensitive information should be included in telemetry.

remarks.text: By default, telemetry includes metadata, such as token counts, but not raw inputs and outputs, such as message content, function call arguments, and function call results. The default value can be overridden by setting the
environment variable to "true". Explicitly setting this property will override the environment variable.

value.text: if potentially sensitive information should be included in telemetry;
if telemetry shouldn't include raw inputs and outputs. The default value is

summary.text: Gets or sets the endpoint URI for the Azure AI service.
Gets or sets the API key used for authentication with the Azure AI service.
Gets or sets the token credential used for Azure authentication.
Extension methods for adding Azure AI Inference services to an Aspire application.
